description: Product Description 2 Pairs Garden Digging Glove with Claws Four built-in claws make digging and planting easy without the need for any other hand tool. They are made of durable ABS-plastic and assembled with glue. Completely shock-resistant and waterproof, these gloves protect your hands from dirt, sweat and injuries when gardening. They also protect you from bacteria and infections that might occur while toiling in the garden. High quality latex coating has good ductility, so garden genie gloves are universal size to suitable for women and men. Won't fall off claws!! 4 ABS plastic claws on Left and RightI Glove, won't fall off claws!! Easy to dig and plant without hand tools in gardening work. High Quality Latex Coating Using natural latex rubber coating material. Waterproof, puncture resistant. Easy to clean, protects your hands from cuts and Broken nails. Breathable Design Nylon knitting on the back of the hand, comfortable and breathable to keep the hands cool and dry even in summer. Application
